playbook.intent: Zero unread customer messages: each ticket resolved or scheduled, top 3 themes pushed into product feedback, churn signals flagged, FAQ updated where the same answer was given twice.
playbook.scope: Zero unread customer messages: each ticket resolved or scheduled, top 3 themes pushed into product feedback, churn signals flagged, FAQ updated where the same answer was given twice.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Inbox triage

tasks.task: Tag each ticket: bug / feature / billing / churn-signal
Set a target response time per category

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when inbox count = 0 unread.

stage.name: Resolve or schedule
stage.intent: Every ticket either closed today or has a scheduled reply.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every ticket has either a resolution or a scheduled action.

stage.name: Verbatim to backlog
stage.intent: Move 3 themes from tickets into product roadmap.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when themes are added to backlog with quotes attached.

stage.name: FAQ + canned reply update
stage.intent: Stop answering the same question twice.

tasks.task: Identify any question answered >=2 times this sweep
Add an FAQ entry or update the doc page

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every asked-twice question is now self-serve.

stage.name: Churn signal flag
stage.intent: Catch leaving users before they go silent.

tasks.task: Trigger a save email or call for each
Pass churn themes to the next retention review

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when each churn flag has a save action initiated.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep-2x-weekly --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep-2x-weekly --format context, json: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep-2x-weekly --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
